summary: Compares two mapping-like records to produce a deterministic sort order, optionally considering only generated output position.
signature_intent: Comparator returning a negative, zero, or positive number for ordering two records.
behavior: Orders first by generated line position.
If generated lines match, orders by generated column position.
When configured to compare only generated output, stops after generated column comparison.
Otherwise orders by source identifier using string comparison.
Then orders by original line position.
Then orders by original column position.
Finally orders by name using string comparison.
Returns zero only when all compared fields are equal under the selected comparison mode.
edge_cases: If generated positions differ, original-position and metadata fields are ignored.
When generated positions match and generated-only mode is enabled, records are treated as equal even if other fields differ.
Missing or non-numeric numeric fields may produce non-standard comparator results according to JavaScript subtraction behavior.
String comparison behavior for missing or non-string fields depends on the string comparison helper.
